TanıtımSubtitle:
PTT APPLICATIONS
NOW UNDER ONE ROOF!
TanıtımMassage:
PTT Cargo, Philately, Telegraph and Kargomat
 applications are now combined in a single app.
 Cargo tracking, sending telegraphs, purchasing
 philatelic products, Kargomat transactions and many more services are now available in one application.
